data.description:
## What
Update README, CLAUDE.md, and docs/ to document the TOML config, precedence, discovery, and the key set; remove references to the bespoke flat format.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] README/CLAUDE.md/docs describe TOML config + precedence + discovery + keys
- [ ] No stale references to the bespoke flat .rebar/config.conf format (except the back-compat note)
- [ ] Full suite green
Blocked by loader/route/show-config tasks.
data.title: Docs sweep: precedence/discovery/keys (README/CLAUDE.md/docs)
